description: Stability guarantees, plugin hooks, public API audit, and release-readiness for dreamcli 1.0

tasks.title: Lock compatibility matrix and add version checks
tasks.description: Document the supported runtime matrix for Node LTS, Bun stable, and Deno stable in the public docs. Add runtime version checks where the adapters need hard guards, and add coverage proving the documented compatibility story stays enforced.

tasks.title: Implement plugin lifecycle hooks
tasks.description: Add a plugin registration surface on CLIBuilder and wire typed hooks for beforeParse, afterResolve, beforeAction, and afterAction through the execution pipeline. Include tests covering hook ordering, observation, and safe integration with existing middleware and command execution.

tasks.title: Audit the public API surface
tasks.description: Review the curated public entry points in src/index.ts, src/testkit.ts, and src/runtime.ts. Remove any @internal leaks, tighten exported naming where needed, and verify the shipped surface matches the intended 1.0 API boundary.

tasks.title: Add JSDoc coverage for all public symbols
tasks.description: Add or tighten JSDoc on every public exported function, type, interface, and class across the main, runtime, and testkit entry points. Include targeted examples where they materially help, and verify the docs surface is complete for release readiness.
